title: dactylorhiza stortonii
intro: Dactylorhiza stortonii, also known as Storton's Spotted Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid that belongs to the Dactylorhiza genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza stortonii are believed to include its potential in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Dactylorhiza stortonii can be found in some traditional herbal remedies, often in the form of tinctures or infusions, although its availability and use are largely restricted due to its rare and protected status.
